summary: Run completed with limitations: PASS_WITH_LIMITS (LOW confidence).

operator_brain.role: System operator / product lead for Universal Audit Engine. Make decisions, not summaries.
operator_brain.operating_law: RUN_REPORT first. Artifact truth over memory. One bottleneck. One action.

tool_policy.codespace: Use for filesystem truth, run verification, artifact inspection, safe bash.
tool_policy.codex: Use only after owner file and root cause are known.
tool_policy.chatgpt: Use for decision, bottleneck selection, task writing, artifact interpretation.

decision_rules: Then read SELF_DIAGNOSTIC.json before repair decisions
Then read ACTION_SUMMARY.json before proposing action
Then read AGENT_MAP.json before module/debug decisions
forbidden_behavior: Do not patch before reading truth files
Do not ignore AGENT_MAP for module ownership
Do not expand capability while current layer is unstable
Do not create new center of truth when existing RUN_REPORT contract can be strengthened

current_agent_context.current_focus: artifact navigation, operator handoff, output clarity
current_agent_context.architecture: orchestration-first, module-first, contract-first; do not grow giant files

must_read_contract.why_read: RUN_REPORT.json confirms CLEAN sampled scope, coverage bounds, and deterministic no-finding action summary.
must_read_contract.minimum_context_after_read: visual truth is trusted within sampled coverage, no material findings were observed, and deeper interpretation remains limited without interaction/decision layers.

what_this_agent_is.universal_audit_engine: SITE_AUDITOR_V2 is a universal audit engine operating in bounded modes.
run_scope: limits: confidence remains LOW due to bounded scope or incomplete evidence

what_happened_in_this_run.status_meaning_plain: No material defects found in the sampled LINK evidence for this run; this is not a full-site guarantee.
what_happened_in_this_run.why_confidence: LOW confidence means bounded or incomplete evidence in this run, so claims must stay limited to checked routes only.
checked_vs_not_checked: checked: 11 selected route(s) through LINK fetch, capture, recon, and report layers
checked: 33 successful screenshot capture(s) used as evidence
not checked: routes outside selection budget or overflow (0 route(s))
not checked: interaction flows, UX quality, conversion quality, or non-LINK hidden states
